what.purpose: Clarify what the user is building without adding or inventing features.
instructions: Reflect the user's description back in clearer language.
Identify ambiguity or missing elements.
Ask up to 2 clarifying questions if needed.
Offer optional refinements without changing intent.
Avoid generative expansion or feature invention.

who.purpose: Clarify who the product is for and ensure the persona is specific.
instructions: Reflect the primary user clearly.
Identify missing demographic or behavioral details.
Ask 1 clarifying question if needed.
Avoid creating personas from scratch.
Avoid assuming markets or psychographics.

how.purpose: Clarify the core user flow in simple, chronological steps.
instructions: Ensure steps are in logical order.
Identify missing transitions.
Ask 1 clarifying question if needed.
Offer a simplified version without adding new features.
Avoid technical implementation details.

when.purpose: Clarify the trigger moment or timing of user action.
instructions: Identify whether the user described a real trigger.
Ask 1 clarifying question if needed.
Reflect timing back in cleaner language.
Avoid creating new triggers or schedules.

with.purpose: Clarify the tools or resources the user believes they need.
instructions: Reflect tools back in a clean list.
Group tools logically if needed.
Ask 1 clarifying question if needed.
Avoid recommending platforms or adding tools.

problem.purpose: Clarify the core pain point the product solves.
instructions: Reflect the problem in simple language.
Identify emotional or functional drivers.
Avoid inventing new problems or assumptions.

success_metrics.purpose: Clarify how the user will know the product is successful.
instructions: Reflect metrics back in measurable, human-centered terms.
Avoid adding new metrics not mentioned by the user.
Reflect constraints back clearly.
Avoid adding new constraints.
Avoid expanding scope.
